name: Speckle-Faceted Ceramic Pampas Jar Candle Brown/White 6oz - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Add decorative appeal to your space while spreading a woodsy aroma with the Speckle-Faceted Ceramic Pampas Jar Candle from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This white and brown jar candle features a round shape with a speckled, faceted design for a beautiful look. The scented jar candle has a mix of violet, amber and woodsy scents to help spread a refreshing ambience. Made of ceramic and filled with palm and paraffin wax, this faceted jar candle burns for around 20 hours.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
